headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Find Risky
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.

headline: Third Point Sold CoStar Group (CSGP) On Thesis Breakdown
summary: Third Point Management, a New York-based investment advisor, released its first-quarter 2025 investor letter. Third Point’s flagship Offshore Fund returned -0.6% in Q1 2026. The fund started the quarter strong with gains in semiconductors, memory, equipment, infrastructure, aerospace, and defense. A copy of the letter is available to download here. Despite profits and reducing exposures before […]

headline: Homes.com Shares Most Expensive Home Sales Across Major U.S. Markets in March
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., April 21, 2026--Homes.com, a CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) leading online residential marketplace, published the most expensive publicly marketed home sales across major U.S. metropolitan areas for the month of March. The full analysis is available here.

headline: CoStar: Even After The Fall, This Stock Remains Vulnerable In The AI Age
summary: CoStar's moat may be fading as AI gains the capability to scrape through commercial real estate data. Find out why CSGP stock is a Sell.
